title: 恋爱单选题
description:
Game introduction Male Lord Wu worry because of an accident dying, fell into a coma. Then the mysterious female NPC appeared, creating a different space for Wu Worry to create a chance to save themselves, the protagonist of the game Wu Worry to find out his true love in the end, in order to wake up and survive.Game features• Live-action interpretation, live-action shooting, first-person perspective, immersive scenes and interaction with real people, so that you can experience one story and pure love.
 
• Double identity, multiple endings, you can experience the game from the perspective of "rich" and "Yan" two identities, each identity is a separate story, a total of more than 100 story branches, more than 20 ending experiences, and different identities have their own special eggs to support deep exploration and multiple experiences.
 
• Rich gameplay, as well as diverse performance, so that your love life is not limited to choice, but also through various forms of interaction to participate in it, unique "system tasks" will also help you on the road to love.
 
• Thoughtful gifts, as well as a large collection of objects, so that you can make surprises for the girl on the road to love, so that not only can increase her affection but also unlock the exclusive album, to see her in and out of the game.
 
• Seven different girls will become the target of love, she or naive, or capricious, or sexy charming, or noble cold, looking forward to your care and company.
